transcript: Guys, Coach Brian Klopacki here with my buddy Chris. We're going to turn this park bench into a little workout station. We'll be right back. So, take those four exercises, which are hitting all the muscles of the body, hitting the legs, doing some explosive work, and getting your heart rate up a little bit. Great for calorie burning. You can do that just about anywhere. Do as many rounds as you want. You can do AMRAP style, take 20 minutes, do as many rounds as possible with some water breaks in between, do it for five sets, whatever. Time yourself with each exercise. There's a lot of different ways to kind of go at stuff like that, but fantastic. There's no excuses. If you don't have equipment, you don't have a gym, everybody has a bench somewhere and they can do those four exercises. Thanks so much, Coach Brian. We'll see you again soon. Check the links below.
